title: Japan records its first ‘cruelly hot day’ as cities swelter in 40-degree heat
summary: In April Japan coined new term kokushobi for days above 40C as country advises workers to wear shorts to the office to cope with stifling heatJapan logged its first official kokushobi or “cruelly hot day” on Tuesday since the new term for when temperatures top 40 degrees Celsius was introduced in April. title: The First Chatbot’s Multiple Personalities
summary: ELIZA is remembered as the world’s first AI star, a kindly therapist in chatbot form that gently probed users’ worries. Even its creator, Joseph Weizenbaum, was surprised by the warm reception given to his experiment in human-machine interaction. title_cn: 第一个聊天机器人的多重性格
summary_cn: ELIZA 被认为是世界上第一位人工智能明星，是一位以聊天机器人形式出现的友善治疗师，可以温和地探究用户的担忧。就连它的创造者 Joseph Weizenbaum 也对它受到的热烈欢迎感到惊讶。

title: Why AI Needs a “Genie Coefficient”
summary: Major benchmarks measure what AI can do. None measure whether it does what you mean: the distance between what you ask an AI to do and the unspoken assumptions about how you want the AI to do it. We propose a new metric: the Genie coefficient.There’s often a gap between one person’s request and another’s understanding. Most of the time, we bridge it using general knowledge. title: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI agents are being given real access to systems and data while the controls meant to contain them lag behind. title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
summary: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead.
